name: smart-notes-platform
description: Smart Notes Sharing & Learning Platform - monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w server" "npm run start -w web"
